senses.gloss: to blow, to blast, to gust
to ravage, to plague, to rupture on, to hit, to overtake

examples.text: وزير الخارجية الروسي سيرغي لافروف رأى أن مدريد تحاول ابعاد الأنظار عن أسوأ أزمة سياسية تعصف باسبانيا منذ عقود.
examples.english: The Russian Minister of the Exterior Sergey Lavrov observed that Madrid tries to keep the spotlight aloof from the worst political crisis which has ruptured on her in decades [by claiming a Russian involvement in causing the Catalonia crisis].
